summary: Phase D4 - Request Lifecycle Inline Display testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend returns request_lifecycle object in compliance-file endpoint with status, timestamps, source, stale detection, multi-file counts, and action flags. Frontend RequestLifecycleInline component displays status badges, timestamps, and quick action buttons (Request, Resend, Request Replacement).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D4 Request Lifecycle Inline Display complete. Evidence rows now show request_lifecycle data inline with status badges (Not Requested, Requested, Viewed, Submitted), timestamps, source (manual/scheduled), stale detection, multi-file awareness, and quick action buttons. DBS Certificate Evidence has 'sent' status with Resend and Request Replacement buttons. RTW Evidence has 'not_requested' status with Request button.

request_lifecycle_in_compliance_file.details: compliance-file endpoint returns request_lifecycle object in all evidence rows

request_lifecycle_structure.details: Contains status, current_request, last_requested_at, last_viewed_at, last_submitted_at, source, is_stale, stale_days, files_submitted, files_needed, can_resend, can_request_replacement, is_replacement_request

dbs_evidence_sent_status.details: DBS Certificate Evidence has status='sent' with current_request details

can_resend_flag.details: can_resend=True for sent/viewed status, False for not_requested

multi_file_awareness.details: files_needed and files_submitted fields present and correct

stale_request_detection.details: is_stale and stale_days fields present, stale_days >= 7 when is_stale=True

current_request_structure.details: current_request contains id, status, source, sent_at, viewed_at, submitted_at, due_date, reminder_count, is_replacement

source_field.details: source field is 'manual' or 'scheduled' or null

frontend_request_lifecycle_inline.details: RequestLifecycleInline component displays status badge, timestamps, and quick action buttons

frontend_status_badges.details: Status badges show 'Requested' (blue) for sent status, 'Not Requested' (gray) for not_requested

frontend_resend_button.details: Resend button visible for sent/viewed status with can_resend=True

frontend_request_replacement_button.details: Request Replacement button visible when can_request_replacement=True

frontend_request_button.details: Request button visible for not_requested status, opens Request Document modal

frontend_request_modal.details: Request Document modal shows employee email, optional message field, Cancel and Send Request buttons
